findings.title: Org reusable workflows pinned to moving @main
findings.evidence: 12 calls to ByronWilliamsCPA/.github/...@main (ci.yml:32 etc.); pr-validation.yml:42 is SHA-pinned
findings.recommendation: Pin every reusable-workflow call to a commit SHA and update via Renovate.

findings.title: SonarCloud organization mismatch (williaby vs ByronWilliamsCPA)
findings.evidence: ci.yml:39 ByronWilliamsCPA vs sonar-project.properties:7 / sonarcloud.yml:131 williaby
findings.recommendation: Set the correct organization identically in all three places.

findings.title: Core modules import optional api-extra deps (fastapi/starlette)
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml:23-27 vs 134-139; middleware/__init__.py:23-28 re-exports starlette-importing module
findings.recommendation: Move fastapi/starlette/uvicorn to core dependencies or guard imports so middleware/api are import-safe.

findings.title: No entrypoint; Dockerfile targets missing main:app and skips api extra
findings.evidence: Dockerfile CMD uvicorn foundry_unify.main:app; no main.py; RUN uv sync --frozen --no-dev (api extra excluded)
findings.recommendation: Add main.py exposing app and build with --extra api.

findings.title: Container base images not digest-pinned
findings.evidence: Dockerfile: FROM python:3.12-slim (x2); COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest
findings.recommendation: Pin base images by sha256 digest and let Renovate bump them.

findings.title: Python 3.10 lower bound nears security EOL (Oct 2026)
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml:12 requires-python = ">=3.10,<3.15"; CI/Dockerfile target 3.12
findings.recommendation: Raise floor to >=3.11/>=3.12 before 3.10 EOL or add 3.10 to the test matrix.

findings.title: Readiness probe always returns healthy (empty checks dict)
findings.evidence: api/health.py:157-186 all([]) is True; checks never populated
findings.recommendation: Wire real checks or return 503/documented state until checks registered.

findings.title: sonarqube-quality-gate-action pinned to @master
findings.evidence: sonarcloud.yml:136 uses sonarsource/sonarqube-quality-gate-action@master
findings.recommendation: Pin to a released SHA like the sibling scan action.

findings.title: uv installed via unpinned curl|sh in CI
findings.evidence: sonarcloud.yml:108-110 curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
findings.recommendation: Use SHA-pinned astral-sh/setup-uv action.

findings.title: Duplicate SonarCloud analysis
findings.evidence: ci.yml:38 enable-sonarcloud:true and standalone sonarcloud.yml both scan same project
findings.recommendation: Keep one Sonar path; delete sonarcloud.yml if the org workflow handles it.

findings.title: Non-blocking SonarCloud quality gate
findings.evidence: sonarcloud.yml:120 tests continue-on-error:true; :135 quality gate continue-on-error:true
findings.recommendation: Make the gate blocking or remove the workflow.

findings.title: Planning docs Awaiting Generation; no real ADRs
findings.evidence: project-vision.md:14 / tech-spec.md:14 / roadmap.md:14 Status: Awaiting Generation; ADRs only templates
findings.recommendation: Generate planning docs and write ADRs for uv/BasedPyright/FastAPI/structlog choices.

findings.title: Full CI runs twice per PR
findings.evidence: python-ci.yml invoked by ci.yml:35 and pr-validation.yml:42 on same PR
findings.recommendation: Run python-ci.yml once on PRs; have the other depend on it or cover only extra jobs.

findings.title: README presents unbuilt OCR service as built
findings.evidence: README describes OCR service; src/ has only scaffolding; documented middleware import needs api extra
findings.recommendation: Add a pre-alpha/scaffolding banner and mark API examples as needing the api extra.

findings.title: Stated OCR product has zero domain code
findings.evidence: All 1886 src LOC are template scaffolding; no OCR/layout module; 3 commits
findings.recommendation: Treat as scaffolding; track the gap in roadmap and align README maturity claims.

findings.title: Heavyweight ml extra declared but unused
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml:124-130 (torch/torchvision/numpy/sklearn/tensorboard); no imports in src/
findings.recommendation: Defer or comment out the ml extra until code uses it.

findings.title: Commented doc block inside dependencies array
findings.evidence: pyproject.toml:28-74 ~45 lines of commented compatibility notes
findings.recommendation: Move commentary to docs/PYTHON_COMPATIBILITY.md.

findings.title: Non-asserting placeholder test (assert True)
findings.evidence: tests/test_example.py:388 assert True
findings.recommendation: Assert on observable output or delete the test.

findings.title: Empty financial.py stub (template residue)
findings.evidence: financial.py:1 one-line docstring, no code
findings.recommendation: Delete the file and its CLAUDE.md entry, or populate it.

findings.title: Some actions tag-pinned not SHA-pinned
findings.evidence: 5 of 30 uses: lines tag-pinned: setup-uv@v7, dependency-review-action@v4
findings.recommendation: SHA-pin these to match the other workflows.

findings.title: Weak placeholder password in .env.example
findings.evidence: .env.example:200 DB_PASSWORD=password
findings.recommendation: Use a placeholder-style value like changeme-your-db-password.

findings.title: Same reusable workflow pinned @main and @SHA
findings.evidence: ci.yml:35 @main vs pr-validation.yml:42 @e8fc83c
findings.recommendation: Pin both to the same SHA.

findings.title: Obsolete docker-compose version attribute
findings.evidence: docker-compose.yml:4 version: '3.9'
findings.recommendation: Remove the version line.

findings.title: Stale pre-commit pins; basedpyright gate missing from pre-commit
findings.evidence: .pre-commit-config.yaml:130 ruff rev v0.9.0 vs installed 0.15.x; no basedpyright hook
findings.recommendation: Run pre-commit autoupdate and add a basedpyright local hook.

findings.title: pip cache configured on a uv-managed project
findings.evidence: sonarcloud.yml setup-python cache: 'pip'
findings.recommendation: Drop cache:'pip'; use setup-uv caching.

findings.title: CHANGELOG claims Poetry and a nonexistent CLI
findings.evidence: CHANGELOG.md:18 'Poetry package management'; 'CLI tool foundation' with no CLI in src
findings.recommendation: Replace Poetry with uv and drop the CLI line until a CLI exists.

findings.title: Malformed uv command in README
findings.evidence: README.md:86 uv sync --all-extras,ml (invalid)
findings.recommendation: Use uv sync --extra ml or --all-extras.

findings.title: CLAUDE.md structure lists empty financial.py, omits api/
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md Project Structure lists financial.py (Decimal precision) which is empty; api/ not listed
findings.recommendation: Update the structure block to match src/.

findings.title: Planning docs and ADRs unwritten but linked
findings.evidence: planning/*.md:14 Awaiting Generation; ADRs only template
findings.recommendation: Generate the docs or mark links as to-be-written.
